Class DeleteSchemaPropertyCommand

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.cmd.AbstractCommand
io.apicurio.datamodels.cmd.commands.DeleteSchemaPropertyCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICommand
public class DeleteSchemaPropertyCommand extends AbstractCommand
A command used to delete a single property from a schema definition in a document.
Author:
eric.wittmann@gmail.com
